runs.brief_en: Early June 22 (Taipei): Musk marked Father's Day with family posts, pushed UK grooming-gang/media-coverage critiques (RT + 💯), demoed Grok Imagine, quoted skepticism on puberty blockers vs social-media age rules, boosted a California Starlink launch, and shared lighter video and history takes.
runs.brief_zh: 台北6/22凌晨：馬斯克父親節發文、轉推並認同英國性侵醜聞與媒體雙標評論、展示Grok Imagine、質疑青春期阻斷與社群年齡規定矛盾、轉推加州Starlink發射，並分享影片與歷史趣談。

runs.brief_en: Elon amplified UK grooming gangs and media double standards (retweeted Darth Powell, replied 💯 to rape gangs post, shared related video on Islamist threats), posted Grok Imagine dancing kittens video, said AI will exceed all human intelligence in 4-5 years, demanded 'Execute them' in UK baby murder case, called Ro Khanna an 'evil liar' over tax proposals, endorsed 'McCarthy was right' on stripping terrorists' citizenship, joked 'Full access' on vibecoding, retweeted Starlink launch, shared Father's Day tributes and history replies.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克放大英國 grooming 團伙與媒體雙重標準（轉推 Darth Powell、💯 回覆強暴團伙貼文、分享相關伊斯蘭威脅影片），貼出 Grok Imagine 跳舞小貓影片，稱 AI 4-5 年內將超越全人類智慧，要求處決英國虐兒兇手，痛批 Ro Khanna 為「邪惡騙子」，認同「麥卡錫沒錯」剝奪恐怖分子公民權，幽默評「完全存取權」vibecoding，轉推 Starlink 發射、分享父親節致敬與歷史回覆。

runs.brief_en: Elon spent Father's Day amplifying UK grooming/media critiques, demanding 'Execute them' in a horrific baby case, predicting AI beats all human intelligence in 4-5 years, blasting Ro Khanna and endorsing 'McCarthy was right,' while demoing Grok Imagine. Silent since early morning. Tesla quoted FSD praise; SpaceX launched Starlink from California.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克父親節放大英國醜聞與媒體雙標、要求處決虐嬰兇手、稱AI四五年超越人類智慧、批Khanna與麥卡錫議題，展示Grok；凌晨後沉寂。Tesla轉推FSD好評。

items_flat.title_en: Musk amplifies UK grooming-gang and media double-standard critiques
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克放大英國 grooming 團伙與媒體雙重標準批評
items_flat.summary_en: Musk retweeted @VladTheInflator contrasting a single Edinburgh knife attack labeled terrorism with grooming gangs' industrialized abuse of ~250,000 British girls that authorities downplayed. He later replied '💯' to another post on torture and cover-ups, then shared a video on Islamist threats and related UK issues.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推 @VladTheInflator，對比愛丁堡持刀案被標恐怖主義，卻對 grooming 團伙長期強暴約25萬女孩、當局掩蓋醜聞保持沉默。他後續對酷刑與掩蓋貼文回「💯」，並分享伊斯蘭威脅等英國議題影片。

links.label: Elon Musk video share on X

items_flat.title_en: Musk: 'Execute them' in horrific UK baby murder case
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克在英國嬰兒謀殺慘案中說「處決他們」
items_flat.summary_en: Musk replied 'Execute them' to a post on a British teacher couple convicted of murdering and severely sexually abusing their 1-year-old adopted son Preston, with evidence of prolonged torture that reports say media downplayed.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克回覆「Execute them」，針對英國教師伴侶被判謀殺並嚴重性侵1歲領養兒 Preston 的案件，證據顯示長期酷刑，媒體報導據稱刻意淡化。

items_flat.title_en: Musk: AI will exceed the sum of all human intelligence in 4-5 years
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：AI 將在 4-5 年內超越全人類智慧總和
items_flat.summary_en: Musk stated: 'AI probably exceeds the sum of all human intelligence in 4 or 5 years.' The comment landed amid ongoing debate over rapid AI progress and xAI's trajectory.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克表示：「AI probably exceeds the sum of all human intelligence in 4 or 5 years.」此言出現在討論 AI 快速進展與 xAI 發展的脈絡中。
items_flat.musk_quote: AI probably exceeds the sum of all human intelligence in 4 or 5 years
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: AI 可能在 4 或 5 年內超越全人類智慧的總和。

items_flat.title_en: Musk retweets Falcon 9 Starlink launch from California
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克轉推 Falcon 9 從加州發射 Starlink 衛星
items_flat.summary_en: SpaceX announced Falcon 9 launched 24 Starlink satellites from California with video and photos. Musk retweeted without added commentary, amplifying the successful mission.
items_flat.summary_zh: SpaceX 宣布 Falcon 9 從加州發射 24 顆 Starlink 衛星，附影片與照片。馬斯克轉推未加評論，放大此次成功任務。

items_flat.title_en: Musk posts Father's Day tributes to family and Karl Marx's dad
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克發文父親節致敬家人與卡爾·馬克思的父親
items_flat.summary_en: Musk posted 'Happy Father's Day!' to huge engagement. He quote-posted Karl Marx's father's letter criticizing his son's lifestyle, adding 'Karl's Dad was cool,' and replied with a heart to mother Maye Musk's post.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克貼文「父親節快樂！」互動極高。他轉推卡爾·馬克思父親批評兒子的信並寫「Karl's Dad was cool」，並以愛心回覆母親 Maye Musk 的貼文。

links.label: Elon Musk Happy Father's Day on X
Elon Musk Karl's Dad quote-post on X
Elon reply to Maye on X

items_flat.title_en: Musk demos Grok Imagine with dancing kittens video prompt
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克展示 Grok Imagine 跳舞小貓影片提示
items_flat.summary_en: Musk posted a Grok Imagine video of mitten-wearing kittens dancing and singing 'we're kittens with mittens.' He shared the full prompt and wrote 'Your kids will love this video!'
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克貼出 Grok Imagine 生成的戴手套小貓跳舞唱「we're kittens with mittens」影片，分享完整提示並寫「Your kids will love this video!」
items_flat.musk_quote: Your kids will love this video!
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: 你的孩子會喜歡這段影片！

items_flat.title_en: Musk: blocking puberty at 11 but allowing social media makes no sense
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：11歲可阻斷青春期卻要到16歲才准用社群媒體說不通
items_flat.summary_en: Quote-posting educator Katharine Birbalsingh's criticism that children can block puberty at 11 yet are told to avoid social media until 16, Musk wrote: 'Makes no sense.'
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推教育家 Katharine Birbalsingh 批評：孩子11歲就能阻斷青春期，卻被告知要到16歲才能用社群媒體，他只寫：「Makes no sense.」

items_flat.title_en: Musk shares Charlie Kirk legacy conversion video
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克分享 Charlie Kirk 遺產轉變影片
items_flat.summary_en: Musk posted without added text a video of a man who once said he was glad Charlie Kirk was murdered, then said Kirk's videos and debates changed his life, reconciled his family, and made Kirk his hero.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克無文字分享影片：一名男子曾稱樂見 Charlie Kirk 被謀殺，後來表示 Kirk 的影片與辯論改變他的人生、讓家庭和解，並視 Kirk 為英雄。

items_flat.title_en: Musk calls Ro Khanna an 'evil liar' over tax-the-rich proposals
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克痛批 Ro Khanna 為「邪惡騙子」，針對「向富人課稅」提案
items_flat.summary_en: Replying to a post quoting Rep. Ro Khanna on taxing Musk 5% once to fund $10/day child care and taxing billionaires for student debt, Musk wrote: 'He's such an evil liar.'
items_flat.summary_zh: 回覆引用眾議員 Ro Khanna 建議對馬斯克課徵5%一次性稅資助每天10美元托兒，以及向億萬富翁課稅還學貸言論，馬斯克寫：「He's such an evil liar.」

items_flat.title_en: Musk: 'McCarthy was right' on stripping citizenship from terrorists
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：「麥卡錫沒錯」支持剝奪恐怖分子公民權
items_flat.summary_en: Agreeing with a post on the DOJ using a 1952 law to denaturalize a Somali immigrant who joined al-Shabaab shortly after naturalization in 2007, Musk wrote: 'McCarthy was right.'
items_flat.summary_zh: 同意一則貼文指出 DOJ 利用 1952 年法律，取消 2007 年歸化後數月即加入 al-Shabaab 的索馬利移民公民權，馬斯克寫：「McCarthy was right.」

items_flat.title_en: Musk: 'Works every time' agreeing with Bukele
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：「每次都有效」同意 Bukele
items_flat.summary_en: Musk quote-posted President Nayib Bukele's 'It's a very simple concept, really.' and replied 'Works every time' — amplifying Bukele's security approach.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推總統 Nayib Bukele 的「It's a very simple concept, really.」並回「Works every time」——放大 Bukele 的安全治理方針。

items_flat.title_en: Tesla quotes FSD praise: 'like black and white to color TV'
items_flat.title_zh: 特斯拉轉推 FSD 好評：「像從黑白電視變彩色」
items_flat.summary_en: With no Musk comment, @Tesla quote-posted @dwr's testimonial that after Model Y road trips with FSD 14+, living with FSD Supervised is 'like going from black and white to color TV.'
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克未置評；@Tesla 轉推 @dwr 心得，稱 Model Y 搭配 FSD 14+ 長途與日常駕駛後，全自動輔助駕駛生活「像從黑白電視變彩色電視」。

items_flat.title_en: Musk comments 'Full access' 😂 on viral vibecoding meme
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克幽默評論病毒「vibecoding」迷因「完全存取權」😂
items_flat.summary_en: Musk quote-posted a popular 'Day 1 of vibecoding' AI-coding screenshot with '"Full access" 😂' — widely read as a joke about giving AI coding tools broad permissions.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推熱門「Day 1 of vibecoding」AI 輔助編碼截圖，評論「"Full access" 😂」——普遍解讀為給 AI 編碼工具廣泛權限的笑話。
